title: Constraint6DOF
description: Constraint6DOF: Constraint objects with six degrees of freedom, three translational and three rotational, used for supports and bar end releases.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

TranslationalStiffnessX.description: Defines the stiffness in X-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

TranslationalStiffnessY.description: Defines the stiffness in Y-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

TranslationalStiffnessZ.description: Defines the stiffness in Z-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

RotationalStiffnessX.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the X-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle measured in [N.m/rad].

RotationalStiffnessY.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the Y-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle measured in [N.m/rad].

RotationalStiffnessZ.description: Defines the stiffness for rotation about the Z-axis. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitAngle measured in [N.m/rad].

TranslationX.description: Defines the translational fixity in the X-direction. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

TranslationY.description: Defines the translational fixity in the Y-direction. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

TranslationZ.description: Defines the translational fixity in the Z-direction. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

RotationX.description: Defines the rotational fixity about the X-axis. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

RotationY.description: Defines the rotational fixity about the Y-axis. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

RotationZ.description: Defines the rotational fixity about the Z-axis. DOFType: Enumerator outlining the fixity of a particular degree of freedom. Controls if the DOF should be free, fixed or stiffness based.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
